title: Create t-shirt brand aggregator website

requirements.text: Create a backend data model to store t-shirt brand information including brand name, website URL, and price range

quotes: Create a website for t shirt websites all t shirt brand and link and price of all t shirt brand

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores brand name as text
Backend stores website URL as text
Backend stores price information (minimum and maximum price range)
Data structure supports multiple brands

requirements.text: Implement backend methods to add, retrieve, and list all t-shirt brands
acceptanceCriteria: Method to add a new brand with name, URL, and price range
Method to retrieve a single brand by ID
Method to list all brands
Methods are publicly accessible

requirements.text: Create a frontend page displaying all t-shirt brands in a grid or list layout

quotes: Create a website for t shirt websites all t shirt brand

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays all t-shirt brands
Layout is responsive and works on mobile and desktop
Brands are presented in an organized, scannable format

requirements.text: Display brand name, clickable link to brand website, and price range for each t-shirt brand

quotes: link and price of all t shirt brand

acceptanceCriteria: Each brand card shows the brand name prominently
Website URL is displayed as a clickable link that opens in a new tab
Price range is clearly displayed for each brand
Links are functional and properly formatted

requirements.text: Implement a form to add new t-shirt brands with fields for brand name, website URL, and price range

quotes: all t shirt brand and link and price

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes input field for brand name
Form includes input field for website URL
Form includes fields for minimum and maximum price
Form validates URL format
Form validates price as numeric values
Successfully submitted brands appear in the brand list immediately

requirements.text: Apply a creative, modern visual theme with consistent colors, typography, and layout throughout the website that reflects a retail/fashion aesthetic
acceptanceCriteria: Cohesive color palette is applied consistently
Typography choices enhance readability and brand presentation
Layout design feels modern and appropriate for a fashion/retail context
Visual hierarchy guides users through brand information effectively

constraints: All backend logic must be in the single main actor file
Use only Motoko for backend, React with TypeScript for frontend
Frontend must use Tailwind CSS and Shadcn components for styling
nonGoals: Real-time price updates from external APIs

required: Hero banner image featuring trendy t-shirt designs in a collage style with modern aesthetic (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Placeholder brand logo image for brands without logos, minimalist design (placeholder-brand.dim_200x200.png)
